description: Feature impact matching rules — maps feature keywords to account relevance scores

matches.reasoning: FranchiseWorks manages 18 franchise locations and has an active regional expansion plan. Multi-location features directly address their core operational complexity.
UrbanFit Studios operates multiple fitness locations and is currently struggling with adoption inconsistency across studios. Location-specific features could address this.
CloudKitchen Pro operates multiple kitchen sites. Multi-location features may address some of their adoption challenges by enabling kitchen-level visibility.
Acme Retail is expanding to 5 new locations Q3 2026. Multi-location features will be relevant for managing and onboarding new store leads.
FinEdge Capital is a financial services enterprise with strict compliance requirements. RBAC improvements directly address their data governance and regulatory obligations.
NovaHealth handles healthcare data with HIPAA considerations. RBAC features that enable department-level data sensitivity controls are a compliance requirement.
FranchiseWorks has multiple admin levels across 18 locations. Granular RBAC would allow location-level administrators without giving full platform access.
UrbanFit Studios uses analytics for cross-location performance comparison. Executive dashboard features directly address their leadership reporting needs.
FranchiseWorks leadership needs franchise-level performance benchmarking. Analytics features that support location comparison are a core use case.
FinEdge Capital has expressed interest in executive-level reporting for operational analytics. Custom reporting features are relevant for their compliance documentation needs.
Low analytics adoption at Acme is a current risk. Enhanced analytics features may increase the value of the module and drive engagement.
Acme Retail uses multiple retail operations tools. Integration features would allow data to flow automatically, reducing manual entry and improving adoption.
ZenOps Logistics manages route optimization data across multiple systems. Integration features are a frequently requested upgrade and a path to deeper adoption.
BrightPath raised an integration concern in their last meeting. Integration improvements may address their specific pain point.
CloudKitchen Pro explicitly asked for a simpler onboarding path for kitchen staff. Improved onboarding features directly address their primary adoption barrier.
BrightPath serves educational staff who benefit from structured learning paths. Onboarding improvements align with their organization's training culture.
High staff turnover at studio level creates recurring onboarding needs. Self-serve onboarding features would reduce the burden on the operations team.
